resource "azurerm_role_assignment" "function_app_key_vault_secrets_user" {
  count = local.env.azure_tenant == "dev" ? 0 : 1

  scope                = module.vault_full_private.resource_id
  role_definition_name = "Key Vault Secrets User"
  principal_id         = azurerm_windows_function_app.function_app.identity[0].principal_id

  depends_on = [
    azurerm_windows_function_app.function_app,
    module.vault_full_private
  ]
}
